title: pilosella subrubella
intro: Pilosella subrubella is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Pilosella subrubella can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile ingredient in herbal remedies.
